description_long: This is a tall, elegant ceramic vase with a rounded body, a narrow neck, and a flared rim, featuring two ornate handles that extend from the rim to the shoulder. The surface is decorated with intricate, classical Greek-style motifs in orange and ochre tones against a deep black background, including human figures, laurel wreaths, and stylized foliage. The handles are twisted and patterned, adding a sculptural quality to the form. The upper section of the vase is adorned with a band of palmette and wave patterns, while the main body showcases mythological scenes rendered in a traditional red-figure technique. The base is slightly raised and circular, providing stability. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a well-preserved, high-quality artifact.
description: A tall, black-figure Greek-style vase with ornate handles and mythological scenes in orange and ochre, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and intricate decorative motifs.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a single ornate handle and symmetrical decorative motifs, with the main mythological scene not visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both twisted handles and the central mythological scene with human figures and laurel wreaths.
description_view_2: Opposite rear view, similar to view 0, highlighting the single handle and symmetrical ornamental patterns.
description_view_3: Alternate front view, nearly identical to view 1, showing both handles and the detailed mythological scene.
attribute_pattern: classical Greek figures and foliage motifs
